economic_notes: MFN Land Development Limited Partnership created to invest in, develop, construct, operate and manage real estate and land including fee simple lands. Muskowekwan Gaming Inc. operates bingo events. Muskowekwan Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd. operates retail fuel and convenience. Muskowekwan Family Healing & Wellness Centre Inc. provides health and wellness services.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Five fully consolidated subsidiaries: Muskowekwan Gaming Inc., Muskowekwan Family Healing & Wellness Centre Inc., Muskowekwan Treaty Land Entitlement - Revenue Account, Muskowekwan Business Development Company Ltd., and 211413 Saskatchewan Inc. Four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Muskowekwan Gas Bar & Confectionary Ltd., Muskowekwan Resources Ltd., Muskowekwan Business Development Company II Ltd., and MFN Land Development Limited Partnership. Large deferred revenue - unexpended ISC funds of $10.8M creates significant net debt of $5.9M. Prior period adjustment of $(30,853) recorded against Gas Bar investment. Accumulated surplus figure shows minor rounding discrepancy ($24,807,946 on balance sheet vs $24,807,948 on accumulated surplus statement). Long-term debt includes both long-term debt ($5,565,524) and CMHC mortgages ($4,651,232). Annual debt service includes long-term debt repayment $293,918 and CMHC mortgage repayment $468,374. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $18,476,891 + CMHC $976,895 + TATC $1,161,800 + TCFS $655,495 + Indigenous Gaming Regulators $35,145 - these are the identifiable government/government-affiliated transfers (NSCSF $465,895 and WED $164,721 not included in this estimate but may qualify).
